howto_rules: Inherit from CaseOracleXxxBase classes for each phase
Use find_repo_root pattern with RepoRootLocatedCheck fallback
Use FilesystemPathCheck for verifying output directories and files
Use DependencyVersionCheck for tool version checks
Use BuildCommandCheck with explicit timeout for build steps
All subprocess calls must include explicit timeout argument
example_patterns: egwalker common.py: find_repo_root with marker files, RepoRootLocatedCheck, load_json_file
egwalker env_setup.py: DependencyVersionCheck for toolchain, FilesystemPathCheck for repo root and refs
egwalker artifact_build.py: BuildCommandCheck with verify/command mode env var pattern
egwalker benchmark_prep.py: DatasetManifestCheck against refs JSON
egwalker experiment_runs.py: TimingsJSONSimilarityCheck with Pearson correlation

borrowed_structure.benchmark_prep.py: Trivially passes since plan has no benchmark_prep steps; checks repo data dir existence
borrowed_structure.experiment_runs.py: FilesystemPathCheck for output dirs and files from MILP, simulator, and plot steps

artifact_specific_adaptations: PPipe has no explicit build_artifact steps in the plan; the Java simulator build (env-004) is checked in artifact_build as the main build output
benchmark_prep is empty in the plan; we check that the bundled data/ directory exists as a minimal validation
experiment_runs checks output directories from 11 steps: MILP outputs, simulator logs, and plot figures
Gurobi license check via gurobipy import or gurobi_cl command (optional since license may be configured at runtime)
git-lfs tracked files check via data/ directory presence
plan_summary: PPipe artifact: MILP solver for partition plans, Java discrete-event simulator, and plotting scripts. 4 env setup steps, 0 build steps (Java build moved to env-004), 0 benchmark prep steps, 11 experiment run steps.

step_coverage.env-001: Covered: git/git-lfs version checks + repo root existence
step_coverage.env-002: Covered: Python version check + requirements.txt existence
step_coverage.env-003: Covered: Gurobi license check (optional - may not be available at oracle time)
step_coverage.env-004: Covered: Java version check (build itself checked in artifact_build)
step_coverage.run-008: Covered: fig6 output file existence check
step_coverage.run-009: Covered: fig7 output file existence check
step_coverage.run-010: Covered: fig8 output file existence check
step_coverage.run-011: Covered: fig10 output file existence check

step_gaps: env-003: Cannot fully verify Gurobi license validity without running the solver; marked optional
run-008 to run-011: Exact figure filenames unknown from plan; checked as glob pattern on outputs/ for PDF/PNG files
step_augmentations: artifact_build: Added check for cluster-sim Gradle installDist output directory as the main build verification
benchmark_prep: Added minimal data/ directory existence check even though plan has no benchmark_prep steps
experiment_runs: Added non-empty directory checks for MILP output dirs to verify content was produced
